rows.label: Repository source
rows.sourceRefShape: provider/repository slug with optional default branch summary
rows.previewSummary: Repository selectors expose repository identity and policy status, not repository source contents.

rows.label: Branch source
rows.previewSummary: Branch selectors expose branch identity and freshness posture only.

rows.label: Commit source
rows.sourceRefShape: repository slug plus branch and commit hash
rows.previewSummary: Commit selectors expose commit identity, short hash, and proof roots only.

rows.label: Deposit source
rows.sourceRefShape: deposit id with depository evidence and depositor ownership posture
rows.previewSummary: Deposit selectors expose source-safe deposit metadata, owner posture, and matching readiness.

rows.label: BTD range source
rows.sourceRefShape: BTD id range or deterministic BTD root range
rows.previewSummary: BTD range selectors expose ownership and rights posture without private BTD source.

rows.label: AssetPack preview source
rows.sourceRefShape: AssetPack preview id with measurement roots and settlement posture
rows.previewSummary: AssetPack preview selectors expose measurements and preview metadata only until settlement.

rows.label: Document source
rows.sourceRefShape: document id, attachment id, or source-safe document reference
rows.previewSummary: Document selectors expose title, type, owner, and redaction posture.

rows.label: Prior conversation source
rows.sourceRefShape: conversation id, message id, or source-safe summarized conversation root
rows.previewSummary: Prior conversation selectors expose route-local summaries and proof roots only.
